paper_metadata.title: Text Embeddings by Weakly-Supervised Contrastive Pre-training
paper_metadata.abstract: This paper presents E5, a family of state-of-the-art text embeddings that transfer well to a wide range of tasks. The model is trained in a contrastive manner with weak supervision signals from our curated large-scale text pair dataset (called CCPairs). E5 can be readily used as a general-purpose embedding model for any tasks requiring a single-vector representation of texts such as retrieval, clustering, and classification, achieving strong performance in both zero-shot and fine-tuned settings. We conduct extensive evaluations on 56 datasets from the BEIR and MTEB benchmarks. For zero-shot settings, E5 is the first model that outperforms the strong BM25 baseline on the BEIR retrieval benchmark without using any labeled data. When fine-tuned, E5 obtains the best results on the MTEB benchmark, beating existing embedding models with 40x more parameters.

extraction_data.innovation: Weakly-supervised contrastive pre-training using in-batch negatives and large-scale text pairs, enabling strong off-the-shelf performance on multiple tasks without fine-tuning.
extraction_data.extension: Curated text pair dataset (CCPairs) with aggressive filtering to improve data quality.
extraction_data.license: Not specified (likely closed source as per Microsoft's typical practices)
extraction_data.research_problem: Generating high-quality text embeddings for general-purpose tasks without relying on labeled data.
extraction_data.application: Text retrieval, semantic similarity, text matching, and other tasks requiring single-vector text representations
extraction_data.paper_title: Text Embeddings by Weakly-Supervised Contrastive Pre-training

extraction_data.innovation: Contrastive pre-training on CCPairs dataset for text embeddings, enabling better zero-shot performance on various tasks.
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning on BEIR benchmark datasets (MS-MARCO, NQ, etc.)
extraction_data.extension: Contrastive pre-training on CCPairs dataset for better zero-shot transfer
extraction_data.research_problem: Improving text embeddings for language understanding and transfer learning
extraction_data.application: Text classification, information retrieval, and other NLP tasks
